integrations.name: Hello Solar (template)
integrations.description: Minimal C-language template that publishes a fake solar reading every 10 s. Copy + adapt the data source for your own integration.
integrations.author: freetoon team

integrations.name: OpenWeather
integrations.description: API-driven C template — polls openweathermap.org every 10 min via curl, publishes temp + humidity + description. Demonstrates an external-API integration with a per-install config file (API key).
integrations.author: freetoon team

integrations.name: Water meter (oepi-loepi)
integrations.description: Reads the @oepi-loepi ESP/Wemos water meter (http://<ESP_IP>/water.html, 1 pulse = 1 liter) and publishes cumulative m3 + live L/min flow on BoxTalk. Set the ESP's LAN IP in oepi-watermeter.conf, then bind it to the Water home tile.
integrations.author: freetoon team
